case_title: UNITED PARCEL SERVICE INC. VS. TEAMSTERS LOCAL 665

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER UNITED PARCEL SERVICE INCORPORATED's Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
